[vc_row full_width=”stretch_row_content_no_spaces” row_fullwidth=”yes” css=”.vc_custom_1649669126471{padding-right: 0px !important;padding-left: 0px !important;}” el_class=”resorts-slider”][vc_column][vc_images_carousel images=”22400,22425,22698,23148,23151,24642,24740,24953,25148,25307,25429,25609″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_no” autoplay=”yes” hide_pagination_control=”yes” wrap=”yes”][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1650340840815{margin-top: 60px !important;margin-bottom: 60px !important;}”][vc_column width=”1/3″]

ATW Travels offers a great selection of exquisite and serene resorts for you to travel and relax. Located in the most stunning locations across India, the resorts find themselves wrapped around natural landscapes.
[/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/3″]

We have excellent retreats as part of Hill resorts, River resorts, Beach resorts and Island resorts all over India and Maldives. Experience a journey with genuine hospitality and bespoke wellness. Enjoy a range of wellness therapies at our various resorts and replenish your mind, body, and soul.
[/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/3″]

Our resorts help you embrace the destination’s magnificent heritage and partake in their inspiring culinary feasts. All our resorts boast friendly staff and professional hospitality that offers unmatched luxury and comfort without invading your space and privacy.
[/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width=”stretch_row_content” css=”.vc_custom_1650341726648{background-image:
